examples: Pictured above, the face of a full moon is partly blocked by Earth's clouds, and partly darkened on the upper right by Earth's umbral shadow.
The six elements are manifest in all things great and small, and their polarity deriveth from the Astral heavens above and the Umbral depths below.
During totality, the Moon tracked through the northern part of the Earth's dark umbral shadow, so the southern half appeared considerably darker than the northern part.
